title: Luxury Collector Lineage Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Luxury Collector Lineage Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Luxury collector lineage infographic for Northbridge Customs, presenting thirty-seven fictional high-end electric guitars across Core Line, Studio Line, Heritage Line, Bolt-On Series, Artist Reserve, and Private Stock rows as a definitive museum-grade reference poster. Subject: thirty-seven fictional high-end electric guitars across Core Line, Studio Line, Heritage Line, Bolt-On Series, Artist Reserve, and Private Stock rows appear as meticulously rendered product cards in a premium vertical chart, each labeled with model name, year, pickup type, body wood, finish color, origin note, and collector comment under each guitar. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Gold-rule borders, fictional heritage seals, legend keys using Studio, Standard, Custom, Reserve, Masterbuilt, and Private Stock and HH, HSH, P-90, Soapbar, Vintage Coil, Modern Coil, and Bass icons, row category panels for Core Line, Studio Line, Heritage Line, Bolt-On Series, Artist Reserve, and Private Stock, product-card grid, polished product renders, collector notes, origin/spec lines, and a refined bottom badge/footer. Style: Ornate dark luxury catalog design with high-gloss product renders, antique gold foil lettering, cream microcopy, refined wood-and-metal textures, light vintage patina, razor-sharp infographic precision, and premium collector-guide finish. Color Palette: Black and deep charcoal background with dark figured texture accents, antique gold primary lines, cream text, and restrained accent colors matched to the product finishes. Lighting: Studio-lit product renders against dark panel backgrounds, glossy highlights on polished surfaces, controlled metallic reflections, and consistent museum-display illumination across every card. Typography: All-caps serif headline structured layout type:"luxury vintage guitar comparison infographic poster","subject":"a meticulously detailed, vertically oriented PRS electric guitar collection chart, small serif body labels, script-style fictional signature, readable legend labels, and compact card copy; all visible brand text must use Northbridge Customs or invented sub-labels. Restrictions: Use invented brand and model names only;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Restrictions: Use invented brand and model names only;
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
